рЭРБрЭР•рЭРЃрЭРЮ рЭРБрЭРЮрЭРЪрЭРЂрЭРЭ | No one wanted to be Blue Beard's spouse. So, someone was made to be. And that someone just happened to be you. John Price is the infamous man they call Blue Beard. He seems to adore you dearly and he plans to keep you around until death.

However, that may come quicker than he anticipated because you became too curious for your own good and entered the mysterious room with the black door. He told you not to go in there but you don't listen, do you? If only you stayed curious...

Welcome To The Call Of Duty; Dark Fairytales Series
